s1.title:
Aluminum solutions
for the present and future
s1.text: KraMZ is one of the largest manufacturers and engineering centers of aluminum products and solutions in Russia and CIS

s2.title: Bringing client ideas to life
s2.text: Our main focus at work is people, clients and safety

cards.label: To care for the employees and clients of the company, constantly improving working conditions and perfecting service
Strengthening positions in Russian and international markets by expanding the product portfolio and continuously improving manufacturing and engineering technologies
Inspired by a common idea, company employees are shaping a new tomorrow, in which advanced technologies allow creating a better world

s3.title: History
description: Основанная в 2020 году в Хорезмской области, Gurlan Global Teks с самого начала ориентировалась на создание современной текстильной экосистемы полного цикла.
Объединение всех этапов производства, внедрение технологий и развитие экспортных направлений позволили компании в короткие сроки занять устойчивые позиции на рынке.
Сегодня Gurlan Global Teks — это динамично развивающийся промышленный кластер с фокусом на качество, инновации и международное сотрудничество.

s5.title: Production Areas
s5.subtitle: Krasnoyarsk Metallurgical Plant is the largest enterprise for deep processing of aluminum and aluminum alloys east of the Urals

cards.title: Smelting production
cards.description: Production of aluminum rod Ø 9.5 mm and the full range of aluminum alloys, including high-alloy series 2000, 5000, 7000

cards.title: Pressing production
cards.description: Production of extrusion products from hard- and easy-deformed alloys: pipes, rods, profiles

cards.title: Rolling production
cards.description: The rolling section is focused on the production of coiled strip and plate

cards.title: Forging and stamping production
cards.description: Manufacturing of forgings and stampings for various industries and automotive wheel stampings from 14 to 20 inches

cards.title: Tool production
cards.description: KraMZ has its own base for designing press tooling for in-house production

cards.title: Aluminum Structures Center
cards.description: Wide-profile production allowing the manufacture of non-standard aluminum structures of any complexity and dimensions

s6.title: Sustainable Development
s6.text: We strive to use the principles of sustainable development in all areas of our activities
